info.title: copilot-modernization-mcp
info.description: A tool to assist developers in upgrading .NET Framework and .NET applications to latest versions of .NET.

commands.name: install
commands.description: Install agent, skills, and MCP configuration

options.name: --global
options.description: Install to user profile locations instead of local repo locations

options.name: --all-skills
options.description: Install all skills (not just those listed in the manifest)

commands.name: install-agent
commands.description: Install the modernization agent to .github/agents folder

options.name: --global
options.description: Install to user profile (~/.copilot/agents) instead of local .github/agents folder

commands.name: install-mcp
commands.description: Install MCP server configuration to .vscode/mcp.json or ~/.copilot/mcp-config.json

options.name: --global
options.description: Install to user profile (~/.copilot/mcp-config.json) instead of local .vscode/mcp.json

options.name: --global
options.description: Install to user profile (~/.copilot/skills) instead of local .github/skills folder

options.name: --all
options.description: Install all skills (not just those listed in the manifest)

options.name: --skill-name
options.description: Install a specific skill by leaf name or relative path (e.g. 'sdk-style-conversion' or 'dotnet/common/sdk-style-conversion')

options.name: --extensions
options.description: Specify additional extension assembly to load into the export provider
